markdown:
#  Edit a Change Order in Portfolio Financials 
#####  Legacy
This information is intended for accounts with [Portfolio Financials](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/portfolio-financials/) product in Procore. Please reach out to your Procore point of contact for more information.
##  Background 
The Contract Room is a shared portal where vendors can submit change orders and invoices directly to the project team for approval throughout the duration of the project. The Change Orders tab of the Contract Room is where change orders can be added, managed, and reviewed.
##  Things to Consider 
  * **Required User Permissions** :
    * 'Vendor' access to the project or higher.  
_Note:_ Users with 'Vendor' or 'Limited' access can only edit a change order that they have added. If you are a vendor needing to edit your change order.
  * **Additional Information** :
    * Invoices must be in a Pending state in order to be edited. If an invoice was submitted by the vendor team, it can only be edited by the vendor team.


##  Steps 
  1. Navigate to the relevant **Contract** **Room** by clicking the name of the cost item in the project's **Cost Tracker**.   
_Note_ : Cost items with a Contract Room are marked with a **ribbon** ![Icon Ribbon Pfcp](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/e12d2de58e5c5ac13827dbf1f96f2148/0687361a917c45c1d15c3b11b0b16fac/icon-ribbon-pfcp.png?fm=webp&h=18) icon.
  2. Click the **Change Orders** tab.
  3. Click the change order you want to edit.
  4. Click the **vertical ellipsis** ![Icon Ellipsis Vertical](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/b6d0fa56ca6a66941a4032499f56aec8/2bb6315cb1db00c907bda1e2ae7a081c/icon-vertical-ellipsis.png?fm=webp&h=15) icon and select **Edit**.  
  
![Edit Change Order](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/d6db7190b598e18dfe3d9fcc47ec65f4/9215d4c1f28cd0566b6b9aa8da2f76c4/edit-change-order.png?fm=webp)  

  5. Make any necessary updates to the Change Order Overview and Documents sections.
  6. Click **Save**.


## See Also
  * [Portfolio Financials - Permissions](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/portfolio-financials/permissions)
  * [Complete a Contract or Change Order in Portfolio Financials with DocuSign®](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/portfolio-financials/tutorials/complete-a-contract-or-change-order-in-portfolio-financials-with-docusign)
  * [View the Contract Room in Portfolio Financials](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/portfolio-financials/tutorials/view-the-contract-room-in-portfolio-financials)
title: Edit a Change Order in Portfolio Financials
description: How to edit a change order that was added to the Contract Room in Portfolio Financials.
